{{Quote|Symbiosis has been prrreached since time immemorrrial. Has it made us frrree? Does it make us safe? They say we depend on each otherrr. That we need each otherrr. Hutt slime! We, we must be strrrong. We, ourselves. Whoever needs help will fall. Each—one—of—us must be strrrong enough to take what he wants. Or all will die. All!|Ducilla Brarun|<ref name="Balance Point" />}}
'''Ducilla Brarun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] and the sister of [[Durgard Brarun]]. Living on [[Bburru Station]], she began giving fiery [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi]] and anti-[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] speeches<ref name="Balance Point" /> in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref>
